name: Implementor and Reviewer Parallel
description: Implementor edits while reviewer continuously inspects transcript and diffs.

roles.name: Orchestrator
roles.promptTemplate: Oversee the workflow until the user's coding goal is complete.

roles.name: Implementor
roles.promptTemplate: Implement scoped code changes inside the session workspace.

roles.name: Adversarial Reviewer
roles.promptTemplate: Review implementation transcript and diffs, then send concise findings.

completionCriteria.description: Implementor records final implementation artifact after review is complete.
Reviewer reports no blocking findings or sends concrete fixes.
